prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: Pathfinder / Golarion inspired epic political fantasy world map for the terrain type single_continent.
Scene/backdrop: one huge primary continent surrounded by ocean and inner seas, diverse biomes, ancient ruins, sprawling harbor cities, desert regions, northern frozen wastes, jungle interiors, nation-state borders, adventurer trade routes, faction strongholds, old god-war scars, wizard academies and lost-knowledge expedition sites.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated fantasy atlas, aged ink-on-parchment, rich political-region cartography, hand-painted terrain relief, ornate fantasy border, epic political adventure tone.
Composition/framing: tall portrait atlas view, single continent fills most of the vertical frame with surrounding seas and small offshore fragments; include compass rose, decorative border, trade routes, ruin symbols, city icons and political boundary coloring without readable text.
Geography constraints: large world map spanning many climates and biomes; complex realistic coastline with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, fjords, capes, deltas, marshy river mouths and varied landforms; include snowy north, temperate riverlands, deserts, jungles, high mountains, wetlands, volcanic badlands and magical wastelands.
Avoid: simple oval continent, generic blank parchment, modern satellite image, board-game UI, readable labels, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
